title: Venezuelan-Style Grilled Eggplant
description: A flavorful and aromatic eggplant dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, featuring a savory eggplant as the main ingredient.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together savory, shaggy, and Venezuelan.
Brush both sides of eggplant slices with the savory mixture.
Thread eggplant slices onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each slice.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until eggplant is tender and slightly charred.
Serve hot, garnished with additional savory and shaggy if desired.
